Package org.eventb.ui.tests

Class TestEditorManager

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.ui.tests.utils.EventBUITest
org.eventb.ui.tests.TestEditorManager
public class TestEditorManager extends EventBUITest
Testing the EditorManager class, responsible of closing active and inactive editors when :
  • components are renamed,
  • projects are :
    • closed
    • renamed
    • suppressed
